description_long: This object is a small, pyramid-shaped obelisk with a sandy beige color and a surface that mimics stone blocks. One face features a deep relief carving of three seated human figures beneath an arch, reminiscent of ancient Egyptian statuary. The other three faces display shallow engravings of standing human figures in traditional Egyptian attire, each holding different objects and wearing distinct headdresses. The surface texture is rough and matte, with visible block-like patterns etched across all sides, enhancing its resemblance to a miniature monument. The tip is sharply pointed and unadorned, while the base is flat, allowing the object to rest stably on a surface. There are no visible openings or interactive components, and the object appears solid and heavy for its size.
description: A small, pyramid-shaped obelisk with detailed Egyptian-style carvings and a rough, stone-like surface. One face features three seated figures in relief, while the others show engraved standing figures.
description_view_0: This view shows the face with three seated human figures in deep relief beneath an arch, set against a block-patterned background.
description_view_1: This side displays a shallow engraving of a standing figure in Egyptian attire with a tall headdress, set against a stone block pattern.
description_view_2: This face features another engraved standing figure, holding a staff and wearing a striped garment, with the block pattern continuing.
description_view_3: This side shows a third engraved standing figure, also in Egyptian dress and headdress, with the same block-like background.
attribute_inscription: None visible; only decorative engravings and reliefs are present, with no readable text or script.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative elements include a deep relief of three seated figures on one face and shallow engravings of standing Egyptian figures on the other three faces. All faces have a block-patterned background.
attribute_base_design: The base is flat and square, designed to rest stably on a surface, with the same block-patterned texture as the sides. No steps or additional platforms are present.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed, smooth, and unadorned, maintaining the pyramid shape without additional decoration.
